candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferred over duplicate total.
Duplicate total revenue line with identical values; useful only as fallback if label changes.

candidates.why: Not revenue; cost-related depreciation.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line; best match.
